proposals.title: [TEMP CHECK] Aave V4 Licensing
proposals.summary_en: This proposal introduces a two-part licensing framework for the canonical Aave V4 repositories: a BUSL–based license for the core codebase, and a Contributor License Agreement (CLA) for anyone who wants to contribute to the codebase. The goal is to p
proposals.summary_zh: 本提案为 Aave V4 代码库引入双重许可框架：核心代码采用 BUSL 许可证，贡献者需签署贡献者许可协议（CLA），旨在保护协议知识产权并规范社区贡献。

proposals.title: [ARFC] Buyback Program - Budget Adjustment
proposals.summary_en: This publication proposes reducing the annual AAVE buyback budget from approximately $50M to $30M ad outlined in the Aave DAO Funding Insights forum post.

proposals.title: [TEMP CHECK] Aave V4 Bug Bounty Program on Sherlock

proposals.summary_zh: Aave Labs 提议在 Sherlock 平台启动 Aave V4 专属漏洞赏金计划，建立持续安全报告渠道，通过分类机制减少垃圾报告并快速处理高危漏洞。

proposals.title: [ARFC] Safety Module - Reduce  Emissions

proposals.summary_zh: 本提案建议按照 Aave DAO 资金洞察论坛帖子的方案，实施 AAVE 代币排放削减。

proposals.title: [ARFC] Deploy Aave v3 on X Layer

proposals.summary_zh: 本 ARFC 提案建议在 X Layer 上部署 Aave v3 实例。

proposals.title: [TEMP CHECK] Deploy Aave Protocol on Monad
proposals.summary_en: This TEMP CHECK seeks the community’s input on deploying the Aave Protocol on Monad, a fully EVM-compatible, high-throughput network well-suited to supporting high-frequency DeFi applications.
proposals.summary_zh: 温度检查提案，征求社区对在 Monad（完全兼容 EVM 的高吞吐量网络）上部署 Aave 协议的意见，该网络适合高频 DeFi 应用。

proposals.title: [TEMP CHECK] Aave Will Win Framework
proposals.summary_en: Aave began with the thesis that decentralized lending could play a major role in traditional finance. Eight years later, that thesis has been validated.
proposals.summary_zh: Aave 最初的论点是去中心化借贷可在传统金融中扮演重要角色。八年后，这一论点已得到验证。

proposals.title: [ARFC] Aave v3.7 candidate

proposals.title: [ARFC] Revenue-indexed deficit offsets for Umbrella

proposals.summary_zh: Umbrella 使赤字处理显式化且可机制化执行。链上确认储备赤字后，协议先用 DAO 担保的优先损失层（deficitOffset），再将损失传递给 Umbrella 质押者。

proposals.title: [ARFC] Deficit Realization Risk Oracle: Forcing Timely Bad-Debt Recognition via Dust-Collateral Cleanup

proposals.title: [ARFC] Deploy Aave v3 on Mantle

proposals.title: Integrate Lido into the Galaxy Challenge Game 🚀
proposals.summary_en: Galaxy Challenge is a skill-based Web3 arcade game where players pilot a starship, dodge crypto coins, and survive waves of increasing difficulty. We propose integrating Lido (stETH/wstETH) as a supported deposit & reward token.

proposals.title: Delegate Incentivization Program 2.0

proposals.summary_en: This proposal requests a "skin-in-the-game" one-time $5M DAO Treasury allocation (requested in stETH equivalent) into the planned new Lido Earn vaults: Lido Earn ETH Vault and Lido Earn USD Vault. The purpose of this allocation is to:.

proposals.title: DVT & DVV Incentive Allocation Changes
proposals.summary_en: This proposal introduces a variable incentive allocation model for Distributed Validator Technology (DVT) incentives accrued to the Lido protocol, split between Node Operators and the Mellow Distributed Validator Vault (DVV). The proposed new mechani

proposals.title: GOOSE 2025 cycle: Lido DAO goals for 2026
proposals.summary_en: GOOSE (Guided Open Objective Setting Exercise) is a framework establishing the open yearly process designed for the Lido DAO to pick a set of short- and medium-term goals. During the 2025 GOOSE proposal window, only one proposal for the upcoming 2026
proposals.summary_zh: GOOSE 是 Lido DAO 年度公开目标设定框架。2025 年提案窗口中仅一项 2026 年目标提案提交。

proposals.title: Ecosystem Grant gRequest (EGG): Executing GOOSE-3
proposals.summary_en: This 2026 Ecosystem Grant gRequest (“EGG”) sets out the funding required to execute GOOSE-3 strategic plan for 2026 to support the Lido DAO (the “DAO”) in furthering the Lido protocol (“Lido” or “Protocol”).
proposals.summary_zh: 2026 年生态拨款申请（EGG），列出执行 GOOSE-3 战略计划所需资金，支持 Lido DAO 推进协议发展。

proposals.summary_en: - GOOSE-3 proposes the horizontal expansion of the Lido DAO into new products and business lines. - The current bylaws of Lido Alliance BORG are narrowly drafted and restrict its purpose to the Lido Alliance Program.
proposals.summary_zh: GOOSE-3 提议 Lido DAO 横向扩展至新产品和业务线。当前 Lido Alliance BORG 章程范围狭窄，需修改以支持扩展。

proposals.title: Adopt The SEAL Safe Harbor Agreement

proposals.summary_en: - Lido V3 is a major upgrade to the Lido protocol. The first production-ready V3 build has run through two public testnets and is undergoing audits.

proposals.title: #10 - ETHFI DAO Proposal: Season 5
proposals.summary_en: Following the success of Season 4, this proposal recommends the allocation of 10 million ETHFI tokens for Season 5 (S5), designed to drive strategic growth, accelerate momentum and participation, and expand the ether.fi ecosystem across multiple dime
proposals.summary_zh: 在第四季成功后，本提案建议为第五季（S5）分配 1000 万 ETHFI 代币，推动战略增长和生态扩展。

proposals.title: #9 - Proposal: Diversification of ETHFI DAO Treasury through Investment in Real-World Assets
proposals.summary_en: This proposal, following the passing of the ether.fi protocol revenue distribution to staked ETHFI holders, seeks approval to diversify the ETHFI DAO treasury by investing in a mix of real-world assets such as tokenized treasury notes, along with ETH
proposals.summary_zh: 在协议收入分配给 ETHFI 质押者的提案通过后，本提案寻求批准通过投资代币化国债和 ETH 等资产多元化 ETHFI DAO 国库。

proposals.title: #8 Ether.Fi DAO Proposal: Enhancing ETHFI Utility and Liquidity with Protocol Rebates for Governance Participants
proposals.summary_en: This proposal builds upon the success of Ether.Fi’s buyback and liquidity provision (LP) program by introducing a new revenue-sharing mechanism for ETHFI stakers. We propose allocating 5% of protocol revenue to buy ETHFI and distribute it to ETHFI st
proposals.summary_zh: 本提案在回购和流动性提供成功基础上，引入新收入分享机制：分配 5% 协议收入购买 ETHFI 并分配给质押者。

proposals.title: #7 - ETHFI DAO Proposal: Season 4 ETHFI allocation
proposals.summary_en: This proposal recommends that the Ether.fi DAO allocates an additional 4,000,000 ETHFI tokens for use in Season 4 (S4). The primary purpose of this allocation is to incentivize new promotions and deposits during the season.
proposals.summary_zh: 本提案建议为第四季（S4）额外分配 400 万 ETHFI 代币，用于激励推广和存款。

proposals.title: #6 - ETHFI DAO Proposal: Incentives on Centralized Exchanges
proposals.summary_en: ether.fi proposes an allocation of up to 10 million ETHFI tokens to be used specifically for listing Wrapped eETH (weETH) as collateral on centralized exchanges (CEX) for perpetual trading. This allocation will directly support the growth and adoptio
proposals.summary_zh: ether.fi 提议分配最多 1000 万 ETHFI 代币，专用于将 weETH 作为 CEX 永续合约交易抵押品上线，促进采用。

proposals.title: ETHFI DAO Proposal: Seasonal Rewards and LRT²
proposals.summary_en: Following the success of ether.fi season 1, 2 and 3, ether.fi proposes extending the seasons initiative with the introduction of season 4, targeted at fostering community engagement and support in the restaking space, while continuing to support the
proposals.summary_zh: 延续前三季成功，ether.fi 推出第四季，促进社区参与和再质押空间支持。

proposals.title: ETHFI DAO Proposal: Increase to Buyback and LP Seeding Allocation
proposals.summary_en: This proposal aims to increase the monthly buyback of ETHFI tokens from the current maximum of 5% to 25%. Additionally, it seeks to utilize liquidity provisioning through Arrakis Finance.
proposals.summary_zh: 本提案将 ETHFI 月度回购比例从最高 5% 提升至 25%，并利用 Arrakis Finance 进行流动性提供。

proposals.title: ETHFI DAO Proposal: Staking Contract Implementation
proposals.summary_en: This proposal seeks approval for the deployment of a staking contract for ETHFI on Ethereum mainnet. The ETHFI staking mechanism aims to provide genuine utility by linking rewards to governance participation and effective balances in the ecosystem.
proposals.summary_zh: 本提案申请在以太坊主网部署 ETHFI 质押合约，通过将奖励与治理参与和生态有效余额挂钩提供实用性。

proposals.title: ETHFI DAO proposal: Season 3 and airdrop token allocation
proposals.summary_en: will not only reward our community members for their continued participation and support, but also incentivize future engagement and growth within the ether.fi ecosystem. We kindly request your thoughtful consideration and participation in the voting
proposals.summary_zh: 不仅奖励社区成员的持续参与，还激励未来的参与和 ether.fi 生态增长。

proposals.title: ETHFI DAO Proposal: ETHFI Buyback and Liquidity Pool Seeding
proposals.summary_en: This proposal suggests initiating the purchase of ETHFI with up to 50% of protocol revenue. Initially 5% of monthly revenue will be used, with future increases to be put to a community vote.
proposals.summary_zh: 本提案建议用最高 50% 的协议收入购买 ETHFI。初始使用 5% 月收入，后续提升需社区投票。

proposals.title: Ethena Risk Committee Elections - Fourth Term
proposals.summary_en: Following the conclusion of the application period, we are pleased to present the final list of shortlisted candidates for the Risk Committee election. As the recent vote to reduce Risk Committee members from 5 to 3 passed with 100% in favour, 3 succ
proposals.summary_zh: Ethena 风险委员会第四届选举最终候选人名单。此前投票决定将委员会规模从 5 人缩减至 3 人，需选出 3 名成员。

proposals.title: Ethena Risk Committee Elections - Third Term
proposals.summary_en: Following the conclusion of the application period, we are pleased to present the final list of shortlisted candidates for the Risk Committee election. 6 successful candidates out of the 7 applicants will earn a seat on the Ethena Risk Committee for
proposals.summary_zh: Ethena 风险委员会第三届选举，7 名申请者中选出 6 名成员。

proposals.title: Proposal: Ethena lending in Aave
proposals.summary_en: This proposal seeks to improve the capital efficiency of the backing assets of USDe by utilizing a portion of the idle USDtb, USDC and/or USDT in the backing as lending collateral on Aave.
proposals.summary_zh: 本提案通过将 USDe 支撑资产中的闲置 USDtb、USDC 和/或 USDT 用作 Aave 借贷抵押品，提升资本效率。

proposals.summary_zh: 本提案介绍 Ethereal：基于 Ethena Network 使用 USDe 的现货和永续合约 DEX，申请从发布起直接集成到 Ethena 储备管理中。

proposals.title: MIP-020: H1 2026 SSF Allocation
proposals.summary_en: MIP-020 proposes to extend the Syrup Strategic Fund (SSF) revenue allocation approved under MIP-019 for an additional six months, covering Q1 and Q2 2026.

proposals.title: MIP-019: Activate the SSF and Sunset Staking

proposals.title: MIP-018: Q3 Fee Buyback Increase
proposals.summary_en: MIP-018 proposes to allocate 25% of protocol fee revenue from Q3 2025 to buyback $SYRUP tokens and distribute these as rewards to stakers of $SYRUP. This proposal builds on the success of Q1 and Q2 buybacks, advancing a mechanism that’s fast becoming

proposals.title: MIP-016: Q2 Fee Buyback Continuation

proposals.summary_zh: MIP-016 提议将 Q2 2025 20% 协议费用收入用于回购 $SYRUP 代币并分配给质押者，延续社区批准的月度回购。

proposals.title: MIP-015: Maple Strategies - AAVE Implementation
proposals.summary_en: MIP-015 proposes the implementation of Aave V3 integration within the Maple Strategies framework established by MIP-014. This implementation will enable pools to deploy capital into Aave V3’s lending markets, expanding Maple’s yield generation capabi

proposals.title: MIP-014: Maple Strategies - Roll Out and Sky Implementation
proposals.summary_en: MIP-014 proposes the foundational implementation of Maple Strategies, beginning with Sky protocol integration. This proposal introduces the base strategy framework and seeks approval for Sky Savings Rate (SSR) as the first supported protocol.
proposals.summary_zh: MIP-014 提出 Maple Strategies 基础实现，从 Sky 协议集成开始，引入基础策略框架并寻求批准 Sky Savings Rate（SSR）。

proposals.title: MIP-013: Fee Buyback Mechanism
proposals.summary_en: MIP-013 proposes to use 20% of protocol fee revenue from Q1 2025 to buyback SYRUP tokens on market and then distribute these as rewards to stakers of SYRUP. A detailed summary of the proposal is provided below, including the background, rationale, me

proposals.summary_en: MIP-012 proposes for stSYRUP to be the governance token for the Maple ecosystem. This MIP contains the rationale behind this proposal and the implementation plan were this MIP to be approved by the community.
proposals.summary_zh: MIP-012 提议 stSYRUP 成为 Maple 生态系统的治理代币。

proposals.summary_en: MIP-011 proposes for the final MPL to SYRUP conversion date to be the 30th of April 2025. The MPL to SYRUP conversion was approved in MIP-010 (MIP-010: SYRUP Token Launch and MPL <> SYRUP Conversion).
proposals.summary_zh: MIP-011 提议 MPL 到 SYRUP 的最终转换截止日期为 2025 年 4 月 30 日。

proposals.title: MIP-009: Upgrade MPL Token Design
proposals.summary_en: MIP009 proposes to upgrade the MPL token to MPLv2 in order to resource growth initiatives and add new MPL utility. This MIP contains the motivation, details on the technical transition and an evaluation of the benefits.
proposals.summary_zh: MIP-009 提议将 MPL 代币升级为 MPLv2 以支持增长举措并增加新效用。
